selections.name: STONEBRIDGE HELIOS
selections.reason: Massive class dropper getting Dexter Dunn in the bike. Set big fractions and sailed to a 1:49.1 mark last time at this level.

selections.name: WAFFLE BLUE CHIP
selections.reason: Draws the Mohawk sweet spot (Post 6) and gets class relief after facing top 4YOs in the Graduate Series.

selections.name: PACINO HANOVER
selections.reason: Dropper who won the last time he raced this low. Needs to avoid getting shuffled back from the rail.

selections.name: RIPASSO
selections.reason: Class drop after closing in 26.2 last week. Will be coming from the back of the pack to grab a slice.

danger_horse.name: DUBLIN DASHER
danger_horse.reason: Tough post 10, but has the back class to hit the ticket if the pace collapses.

selections.name: TOPVILLE LUCKY
selections.reason: Grand Circuit winner with a 1:49.1 mark. Adds Lasix after a poor performance and is the clear filly to beat.

selections.name: LAVENDER SEELSTER
selections.reason: Draws perfectly in Post 6. Set big fractions two back and flew home in 26.1 last time. Early speed threat.

selections.name: PERFECT THOUGHT
selections.reason: Solid rookie season earning $273k. Gets James MacDonald in the bike and can complete the Exacta.

selections.name: MY GIRL FRIDAY
selections.reason: Undefeated at two. Took a fast mark in London last week. Class tested here but has upside.

danger_horse.name: SEASIDE CHARM
danger_horse.reason: Draws well and has shown flashes of speed; could sneak into the Superfecta.

selections.name: FIGMENT
selections.reason: Impressive 1:50.4 win here recently. Two straight wins in similar classes and shoots for his tenth win.

selections.name: SILVERWALLS
selections.reason: Unlucky in defeat last week after a huge three-wide move and a 1:21 flat 3/4 time. Big speed threat.

selections.name: AXIAL
selections.reason: Converted as the 8/5 favorite last week. Steps back up but is sharp enough to take a slice.

selections.name: MAJOR THREAT
selections.reason: Raced great in defeat last week before hooking wheels. Value play for the bottom of exotics despite Post 10.

danger_horse.name: FIRE CONTROL
danger_horse.reason: Draws the sweet spot and has tactical speed to get involved early.

selections.name: BE PERFECT BG
selections.reason: Undefeated 8 for 8. Draws the best post (6) and gets Dexter Dunn. The obvious single in the Pick 6.

selections.name: GALA
selections.reason: Sharp daughter of Downbytheseaside. Likely gets the pocket trip behind the favorite to complete a chalky Exacta.

selections.name: EASY STATION
selections.reason: Improving filly who flew home in 26 flat to win last time. Class tested but a great use underneath.

selections.name: SANGRIA SUMMER
selections.reason: Flew home in 25.3 last time. Will be passing horses late to land in the Tri or Super.

danger_horse.name: P N G SHADOW
danger_horse.reason: Consistent performer who can grab a minor share with a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: ERVIN HANOVER
selections.reason: Dan Patch award winner with a 1:48.2 mark. Dominating Breeders Crown winner kicking off his campaign in an easy spot.

selections.name: CALICOJACK HANOVER
selections.reason: Won three straight here recently. Draws the sweet spot and will blast off the gate to secure a top spot early.

selections.name: BRUE HANOVER
selections.reason: Draws much better tonight after being stuck in post 7 in the Camluck Classic. Can take a share.

selections.name: LOUS WORLD
selections.reason: Won in 1:49 flat two starts back. Mark MacDonald's choice over two others; worth a look underneath.

danger_horse.name: SOARING NOW
danger_horse.reason: Tough post, but has the back class to rally late if the pace is hot.

selections.name: A CLEAN DEAL
selections.reason: Won 9 of 10 starts. Terrific two-year-old who draws well and gets top billing to beat the favorite.

selections.name: LOUA DIPA
selections.reason: Breeders Crown winner who equaled the fastest mile by a 2YO filly in Canadian history. Coming off two losses but remains a massive threat.

selections.name: SHES A BULLDOG
selections.reason: Upset Loua Dipa in the Three Diamonds. Comes off a good second place effort behind A Clean Deal.

selections.name: FABULOUS HANOVER
selections.reason: Grand Circuit winner here last year. Can get positioned in the top four early and land in the Tri or Super.

danger_horse.name: DAYA
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw is tricky, but has the talent to hit the board with a pocket trip.

selections.name: AL PAPI
selections.reason: Burke brigade colt pointing for this race. Raced well in the Breeders Crown last year and draws the sweet spot.

selections.name: SWEET LOVIN LOU
selections.reason: Third in the Grade 1 Metro Stakes. Got a good tightener on May 16th and will be aggressively handled.

selections.name: AZRAEL BLUE CHIP
selections.reason: 7 wins in 12 starts and hasn't missed the Exacta this year. Adds Lasix tonight.

selections.name: NO WAITLIST
selections.reason: Improved at three with solid efforts. Doug McNair chose him over the #2 horse; expect an aggressive drive.

danger_horse.name: SUPERCHAMP HANOVER
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw could lead to a shuffle, but has the speed to contend if the trip works out.

selections.name: TWIN B JOE FRESH
selections.reason: Stellar season earning $724k. Adds Lasix for her six-year-old debut. Dexter Dunn will have her ready.

selections.name: LOUIES GIRL N
selections.reason: Outstanding since arriving from NZ, winning 12 of 14. Lowered her mark to 1:48.4 last start.

selections.name: ALWAYS B NAUGHTY
selections.reason: Razor-sharp with two straight wins. Kicked home in 26.3 after a parked-out trip last time.

selections.name: RODEO DRIVE DEO
selections.reason: Busy sophomore campaign earning $856k. Draws a much better post tonight to get positioned near the front.

danger_horse.name: GRIT N GRACE
danger_horse.reason: Draws the sweet spot and has the closing kick to hit the bottom of the exotics.

selections.name: BEAU JANGLES
selections.reason: Undefeated 12 for 12 superstar. Metro and Breeders Crown winner. The clear top dog until proven otherwise.

selections.name: BRANDON BLVD
selections.reason: Took a 1:48.4 mark here. Strong winner in the Somebeachsomewhere Stakes last week. Dexter Dunn's choice.

selections.name: ODDS ON MR MAMBA
selections.reason: Fastest 2YO in history (1:47.4). Gets an acid test here but should make the final.

selections.name: MELILLO
selections.reason: Burke brigade entry with two wins and two seconds in four starts. Ceiling is likely a small slice.

danger_horse.name: UBRUTE
danger_horse.reason: Draws well and has the pedigree to surprise if the pace completely melts down.

selections.name: MIKI AND MINNIE
selections.reason: Won 13 of 15 last year including the Breeders Crown. Better on the big track and primed for her first win of the season.

selections.name: THE LAST MARTINI
selections.reason: Dead-heated with Miki And Minnie in the Breeders Crown. Will improve sharply getting back to Mohawk with McNair.

selections.name: TALK CURDY TO ME
selections.reason: Raced well leading up to the Camluck Classic. Should work out a good trip tonight to land in the Tri or Super.

selections.name: AARDIE B MIKI N
selections.reason: 19 career victories. Ships north for Engblom. Widest post isn't terrible in a short field.

danger_horse.name: SKYWALKER SEA
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw is tough, but has the speed to protect position and grab a minor award.

selections.name: ILLICIT BEHAVIOR
selections.reason: Massive class drop resulted in a big stretch move to win OSS Grassroots. The one to beat despite the rail.

selections.name: RYDER ROSS
selections.reason: Got a good trip last week and closed ground late. Major threat with a similar journey.

selections.name: DAD
selections.reason: Good rookie season earning $64k. Races well fresh and can be a speed threat tonight.

selections.name: DR DAVE
selections.reason: Racing well and comes off a narrow loss. Should work out another good trip for a share.

danger_horse.name: WINDSUN TUXEDO
danger_horse.reason: Draws the sweet spot and has the tactical speed to get involved at a price.

selections.name: JMR SPEAK AWAY
selections.reason: Racing well at higher levels. Gets needed class and post relief tonight; expect him to be sent forward.

selections.name: LIVINTHEBEACHLIFE
selections.reason: Dropped and popped last week with a swift 54-flat half. In peak form and a major threat right back.

selections.name: WHATCHULOOKIN AT
selections.reason: Victim of bad racing luck last week. Logical contender but the rail draw could lead to another tricky trip.

selections.name: HUNGRY MAN
selections.reason: Two wins at this class level recently. Will seek out a good following trip to upset.

danger_horse.name: LAKERS BANK
danger_horse.reason: Draws well and can pick up the pieces if the pace is too hot up front.

selections.name: SOLAR VOLTAGE
selections.reason: Nice third-over trip last week against tougher. Leading driver's choice and should be sharper tonight.

selections.name: WINDSUN GUNNER
selections.reason: Raced well in two straight starts at this level before breaking stride. Major threat if he stays flat.

selections.name: DONTENVYME HANOVER
selections.reason: Jogged in a 1:52.3 qualifier. Faded last week but gets McNair and should improve.

selections.name: DYLANS VETT
selections.reason: Sprung a 36-1 upset in his debut. Gets LPR and could receive a more aggressive steer tonight.

danger_horse.name: BARBADIAN BREEZE
danger_horse.reason: Draws in off the AE list. Solid effort last time and could add value to the exotics.
